# platformInfraInitEmptyRepo

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the platformInfraInitEmptyRepo mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.platformInfraInitEmptyRepo({ input: { sId: '<UUID>', storeId: '<UUID>' } }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run platformInfraInitEmptyRepo

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.platformInfraInitEmptyRepo({ input: { sId: '<UUID>', storeId: '<UUID>' } }).execute();
```
